message:
chore: close bd-2z8u (temporary allowlist test compilation fix)

Mark issue bd-2z8u as closed after fixing:
- Added seconds unit support (s/sec/secs/second/seconds) to parse_duration
  in src/allowlist.rs
- Fixed case-sensitive assertion in e2e_allow_command_with_expires_flag test
  where output uses 'Added' but test checked for lowercase 'added'
- All 65 tests now pass

Also updates wa-nu4.3.9.1 CI pipeline issue from in_progress to closed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
